summary: Comprehensive testing of ULN Phase C: Governance & Disputes. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Governance tab with Add Rule button, rule type summary cards, rules table with Edit/Delete actions, rule creation modal with conditions builder. Disputes tab with File Dispute button, status filter pills, dispute list with type/priority badges, dispute detail modal with timeline/responses view and respond form.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend CRUD endpoints properly implement authentication via get_current_user dependency
Governance rule creation validates rule_type against VALID_RULE_TYPES list
Dispute creation validates dispute_type against VALID_DISPUTE_TYPES list
Respond to dispute endpoint properly handles status changes and resolution
Audit trail entries are created for all governance and dispute actions
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Governance modal includes conditions builder with key/value inputs
Disputes status filter pills correctly filter by status
Dispute detail modal shows timeline with response history
Members tab still works after extraction to separate file
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: ULN Phase C Governance & Disputes fully tested. Backend: All CRUD endpoints working for governance rules (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) and disputes (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/respond). Summary endpoint returns combined governance and disputes stats. Frontend: Governance tab shows rule type summary cards (Voting/Content Approval/Financial/Distribution/Membership), rules table with conditions display, Add Rule modal with conditions builder. Disputes tab shows status filter pills (All/Open/Under Review/Resolved/Escalated/Closed), dispute list with type badges and priority indicators, File Dispute modal, dispute detail modal with timeline and respond form. Members tab extraction working correctly. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!

backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{id}/governance: PASS - Lists governance rules with stats
backend_endpoints.POST /api/uln/labels/{id}/governance: PASS - Creates rule with all 5 types (voting, content_approval, financial, distribution, membership)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{id}/disputes: PASS - Lists disputes with optional status filter
backend_endpoints.POST /api/uln/labels/{id}/disputes: PASS - Creates dispute with all 6 types (royalty_split, rights_ownership, distribution, content_takedown, membership, other)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{id}/disputes/{dispu: PASS - Returns dispute detail with responses
backend_endpoints.POST /api/uln/labels/{id}/disputes/{disp: PASS - Adds response with optional status change

frontend_components.Governance tab: PASS - Shows rule type summary cards and rules table
frontend_components.Add Rule modal: PASS - Form with Rule Type, Title, Description, Enforcement, Status, Conditions builder
frontend_components.Conditions builder: PASS - Key/Value inputs with + button to add conditions
frontend_components.Edit/Delete rule buttons: PASS - Action buttons visible on each row
frontend_components.Disputes tab: PASS - Shows status filter pills and dispute list
frontend_components.Status filter pills: PASS - All, Open, Under Review, Resolved, Escalated, Closed filters
frontend_components.File Dispute modal: PASS - Form with Dispute Type, Title, Description, Priority, Assigned To fields
frontend_components.Dispute list: PASS - Shows type badges, priority indicators, status badges
frontend_components.Dispute detail modal: PASS - Shows description, filed date, ID, activity timeline
frontend_components.Respond form: PASS - Textarea with status change dropdown (visible for open disputes)
frontend_components.Members tab: PASS - Extraction to separate file working correctly

data_validation.Status change via respond: PASS - under_review, escalated, resolved, closed all work

mocked_data_note: No mocked APIs - all CRUD operations are real against MongoDB
